message.content:
I'll analyze this website design screenshot with extreme precision to provide a pixel-perfect recreation guide:

## 1. Overall Layout & Structure
- **Background**: Solid black (#000000)
- **Layout**: Full viewport height, centered content with maximum width of approximately 1200px
- **Grid Structure**: Three-column layout for the main content cards, with equal spacing between them
- **Vertical Spacing**: Generous padding throughout, approximately 80px top/bottom margins

## 2. Header Section
- **AI-Powered Design Badge**:
  - Position: Centered at top, approximately 40px from top edge
  - Background: Dark green (#006633) with subtle border
  - Text: "AI-Powered Design" in white, font size 14px, font weight 500
  - Padding: 8px 16px, border-radius 20px

- **Main Heading**:
  - Text: "Smarter Design, Supercharged By AI"
  - Position: Centered below badge, approximately 40px from top
  - Font: Custom serif/serif-style, white color (#FFFFFF)
  - Font size: 48px (desktop), 36px (mobile)
  - Font weight: 700 (bold)
  - Letter spacing: Normal

- **Subheading**:
  - Text: "From wireframes to launch, we blend AI tools with strategy to deliver faster, sharper, and data-led design results."
  - Position: Centered below main heading, approximately 24px from heading
  - Font: Sans-serif, white color (#E0E0E0)
  - Font size: 18px
  - Font weight: 400 (regular)
  - Line height: 1.6
  - Max width: 700px, centered

## 3. Three Feature Cards (Equal Width, Side by Side)
- **Card Container**:
  - Background: Dark purple (#1A0B2E) with subtle gradient
  - Border: 1px solid #2A1B3E (slightly lighter purple)
  - Border radius: 16px
  - Box shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)
  - Padding: 32px
  - Width: 33.33% of container (equal width)
  - Margin: 40px between cards

- **Card 1: "UX Copy That Clicks"**
  - **Title**:
    - Text: "UX Copy That Clicks"
    - Font: Sans-serif, white color (#FFFFFF)
    - Font size: 24px
    - Font weight: 700
    - Margin bottom: 16px
  
  - **Description**:
    - Text: "We use AI to create effective copies like CTAs and microcopy that speaks."
    - Font: Sans-serif, white color (#E0E0E0)
    - Font size: 16px
    - Font weight: 400
    - Line height: 1.6
    - Margin bottom: 24px

  - **Icon Row**:
    - Three circular icons in a row
    - Background: #2A1B3E (darker purple)
    - Border radius: 50%
    - Size: 40px × 40px
    - Margin right: 12px
    - Icons: White, centered
    - Spacing: 12px between icons

  - **Input Field**:
    - Background: #2A1B3E
    - Border: 1px solid #3A2B4E
    - Border radius: 8px
    - Padding: 12px 16px
    - Font size: 14px
    - Color: #E0E0E0
    - Placeholder: "Smarter UX Writing..."
    - Margin bottom: 16px

  - **Generate Button**:
    - Background: #7B2FF7 (purple)
    - Border: none
    - Border radius: 8px
    - Padding: 12px 24px
    - Font size: 16px
    - Font weight: 600
    - Color: white
    - Icon: Left-aligned, white, size 16px
    - Text: "Generate"

- **Card 2: "Visuals, Instantly On Point"**
  - **Title**:
    - Text: "Visuals, Instantly On Point"
    - Same styling as Card 1 title

  - **Description**:
    - Text: "We generate custom visuals using AI for faster concept directions, brand-ready"
    - Same styling as Card 1 description

  - **Tool List**:
    - Three items in vertical list
    - Background: #2A1B3E
    - Border radius: 8px
    - Padding: 16px
    - Margin bottom: 12px
    - Each item contains:
      - Icon: Left-aligned, white, size 20px
      - Text: Tool name (e.g., "Midjourney")
      - Font size: 16px
      - Color: #E0E0E0
      - Font weight: 500

- **Card 3: "Data-Led Design Decisions"**
  - **Title**:
    - Text: "Data-Led Design Decisions"
    - Same styling as Card 1 title

  - **Description**:
    - Text: "We predict user behavior before launch with AI-powered heatmaps that help us"
    - Same styling as Card 1 description

  - **Insight Section**:
    - Background: #2A1B3E
    - Border radius: 8px
    - Padding: 16px
    - **Icon & Text**:
      - Icon: Eye symbol, white, size 20px
      - Text: "Attention Insight"
      - Font size: 16px
      - Color: #E0E0E0
      - Font weight: 500
      - Margin bottom: 16px
    - **Chart**:
      - Bar chart with 8 bars
      - Bars: Gradient from #7B2FF7 to #A56BFF
      - Height variation: tallest bar in center
      - Width: 100%
      - Height: 60px

## 4. Typography Details
- **Primary Font**: Sans-serif (likely Inter or similar)
- **Secondary Font**: Serif (for main heading)
- **Text Colors**:
  - Primary text: White (#FFFFFF)
  - Secondary text: Light gray (#E0E0E0)
  - Accent text: Purple (#7B2FF7)

## 5. Color Palette
- **Background**: #000000 (black)
- **Card Background**: #1A0B2E (dark purple)
- **Accent Purple**: #7B2FF7
- **Button Purple**: #7B2FF7
- **Badge Green**: #006633
- **Border Colors**: #2A1B3E, #3A2B4E

## 6. Spacing & Dimensions
- **Container Max Width**: 1200px
- **Card Width**: 33.33% of container
- **Card Padding**: 32px
- **Card Margin**: 40px between cards
- **Section Padding**: 80px top/bottom
- **Button Padding**: 12px 24px
- **Input Padding**: 12px 16px

## 7. Exact Text Content
- "AI-Powered Design"
- "Smarter Design, Supercharged By AI"
- "From wireframes to launch, we blend AI tools with strategy to deliver faster, sharper, and data-led design results."
- "UX Copy That Clicks"
- "We use AI to create effective copies like CTAs and microcopy that speaks."
- "Smarter UX Writing..."
- "Generate"
- "Visuals, Instantly On Point"
- "We generate custom visuals using AI for faster concept directions, brand-ready"
- "Midjourney"
- "RunwayML"
- "Ideogram"
- "Data-Led Design Decisions"
- "We predict user behavior before launch with AI-powered heatmaps that help us"
- "Attention Insight"

This detailed breakdown should allow for a pixel-perfect recreation of the design. The key elements to focus on are the dark purple card design with consistent border radius and shadow, the three-column layout with equal spacing, and the specific color palette with the purple accent color.
